known_environment_note: Normal python3/pytest startup in this container can trigger artifact_tool spreadsheet warmup and hang; focused tests were run with python3 -S and explicit /opt/pyvenv site-packages on PYTHONPATH to avoid unrelated startup side effects.
non_claims: Focused tests passing does not accept candidate registries as canon.
No full monolithic suite was run in this turn.
No direct ION/03_registry/self_knowledge landing was performed.
